summary: A near‑complete document with a seamless Not Fade Away sequence; echo is noticeable but the recording remains very listenable.
review: The reviewer praises this version as the most complete source of the show, noting that the three‑track Not Fade Away segment flows seamlessly. Recording quality is comparable to other archive files – there’s a noticeable echo, yet it sounds good on neutral headphones or a home system.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; the comment is favorable about completeness and listenability but provides little detail on musical performance, so rating leans modestly positive with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Noticeable echo but overall clear and comparable to other archive sources; seamless transitions despite track splits.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Documented as the most complete version of this concert, with a smooth Not Fade Away sequence despite being split into three tracks.
